params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a D flip-flop with a 2-to-1 multiplexer that selects between the data input (D) and a secondary input (SCD) based on the disable control (SDC). The output of the multiplexer feeds into the D flip-flop, which samples the selected input on the falling edge of the clock (CLK). The final output (Q) is a buffered version of the flip-flop output, providing a clean and stable signal for downstream components.
